sentences.arabic: أَرَادَ الطِّفْلُ أَنْ يَصْنَعَ عَجِينًا مَعَ أُمِّهِ.
sentences.translation: Dijete je htjelo napraviti tijesto sa majkom.
sentences.translationEn: The child wanted to make dough with his mother.

sentences.translation: Pomiješali su brašno, vodu i sol zajedno.
sentences.translationEn: They mixed flour, water, and salt together.

sentences.arabic: فَرَدَا الْعَجِينَ وَقَطَّعَاهُ إِلَى أَشْكَالٍ صَغِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Razvukli su tijesto i izrezali ga na male oblike.
sentences.translationEn: They rolled out the dough and cut it into small shapes.

sentences.translation: Stavili su ga u rernu i radosno čekali.
sentences.translationEn: They put it in the oven and waited happily.
